calendar.matters:
Petition For Determination Of Title To Real Property And For Distribution Thereof
Off Calendar Jun-02-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Douglas Griffin appeared by telephone for Robert Hibner and Curtis Riddle.

Mr. Griffin stated that there was no objection to the petition. There being no objection, the Court stated that everything appeared to be in order and granted the petition (subject to a written order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.
